claim Files 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Not a claim for a person; one (or more) of four non-person scenarios listed in COMMENT 
1 = Yes, claim has a normal MSIS_ID and it is not a service tracking claim 

COMMENT: This indicator distinguishes between claims for services for a person, versus claims that fit any of four 
scenarios: 1) missing MSIS_ID, 2) ampersand-leading MSIS_ID (&MSIS_ID), 3) service tracking claim, 
and/or 4) missing claim type code 

Following are some scenarios
